headline: How The Growth Capex Plan Is Reframing The Targa Resources (TRGP) Investment Story
summary: Targa Resources is back in focus after analysts lifted their fair value estimate from US$264.24 to US$266.80 per share, a modest adjustment that still matters if you are tracking the stock closely. This change sits alongside a wave of fresh research that links higher targets to updated growth capex plans, revised EBITDA forecasts and refined valuation multiples, while also flagging execution and valuation risks. Read on to see how these shifting price targets fit into the broader story and...
